description: If a woodpecker could peck wood how much wood would a Wood row peck Bull still continues to flow freely over the cables ProBritish protest professor Gibbs the English war correspondent should be named Phibbs Truth crushed to earth shall rise again We await the resurrection Since the great naval battle the Germans are offering a vestpocket edition of Rule Britannia I say now you have a bally fine city herebut it aint Lunnon you knaow Pullitsir What is an American patriot these days Ox A wise pig who gets all the swill or a still pig who gets nothing A Burglars ParadiseLots of valuables and uninter rupted enjoyment of them A Burglars TroublesDiscovery capture and punish ment Democratic Delegate at Democratic National Conven tion Who was the greatest President we ever had Martin H Glynn Woodrow Wilson Bryan jumps up on a chair and cheersCharles Murphy sits on a chair in silenceand the empty chairs in the gallery remain empty FRANCE PREPARING TO SELL VALUABLE ART TREASURES IN THE UNITED STATESHeadline When France is compelled to pawn her works of art she is in very bad shape Necessity they say is the mother of invention It is also Woodrow
